items.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
items.summary: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

items.summary: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

items.title: Second hantavirus case confirmed after three die in suspected cruise ship outbreak
items.summary: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch couple and a German national have died.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 大西洋郵輪爆漢他病毒疫情3死、1英男確診 2船員疑感染
items.summary: 隸屬於荷蘭海洋探險公司（Oceanwide Expeditions）的郵輪「宏迪斯號」（MV Hondius），疑似在航行途中爆發漢他病毒群聚感染。截至目前為止，已有1對荷蘭夫婦...…

items.title: 驚動習近平罕見發聲！湖南煙火廠爆炸增至26死61傷 空拍曝現場慘況
items.summary: 中國湖南省長沙瀏陽市「華盛煙花製造燃放有限公司」車間4日下午發生爆炸，爆炸威力強大，遠方民眾都拍攝到蕈狀雲升起，死傷人數持續增加，現已增至26死61傷，現場慘況曝光。  綜合...…

items.title: 被讚「不屈不撓」！賴清德突圍返台 外媒聚焦強硬宣告出訪權利
items.summary: 總統賴清德5日結束非洲友邦史瓦帝尼訪問返抵國門。賴清德強調，國家元首互訪是主權國家的基本權利；此一表態獲得多家國際權威媒體聚焦報導，將此行定位為台灣展現外交韌性的重要行動。 ...…
